description.content: All Babies Channel is a cheerful destination with colorful animation for all the happy babies of the world! Specially designed for kids as they explore the World of the Classic English songs, nursery rhymes, baby songs,  Phonics Songs, Lullabies, and more! Join us and meet, Kent the Elephant, Tim the Monkey, Luke the Lion, and Mumu the Bull from All Babies Channel!

channelMetadataRenderer.title: ABC - All Babies Channel
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
All Babies Channel is a cheerful destination with colorful animation for all the happy babies of the world! Specially designed for kids as they explore the World of the Classic English songs, nursery rhymes, baby songs,  Phonics Songs, Lullabies, and more! Join us and meet, Kent the Elephant, Tim the Monkey, Luke the Lion, and Mumu the Bull from All Babies Channel!

Download the official Kids App http://onelink.to/hooplakidzplus

Watch your Favourite All Babies Channel Nursery Rhymes Ad Free on ABC plus App on Apple App Store.
Free Trial for 7 days.  Click here https://onelink.to/abcplusapp
